pull-request-header: Release v${version} ready for review. Merging this PR tags the commit, then `release.yml` builds, signs, notarizes, and publishes the macOS DMG and ZIP automatically.
pull-request-footer: Do not edit `pubspec.yaml` or `CHANGELOG.md` manually — release-please owns both. To skip a release, close this PR; release-please will reopen it on the next merge to main.
